title: EU probes French aid to EDF for new nuclear reactors
summary_full: French plans to support energy group EDF in the construction of six new nuclear reactors will come under EU scrutiny, Brussels announced Tuesday, with a probe to assess compliance with competition rules. The investigation will look into concerns that state aid could reinforce EDF’s market power and see Paris shoulder too much of the multibillion-euro […]
